**Description:** Community-powered browser extension with 94+ dynamic detections, static IOC feeds, and optional Claude AI analysis. Protection against phishing, ClickFix, and malware.

**Iframes:** 0 | **External scripts:** 0 | **Links:** 22

  > `Win+R`

    - `Ctrl+V`
- **CLICKFIX MULTILANG** *(+48pts)*: 3 multilingual ClickFix instruction signals
  > `Copiar solución | Para provar que não é um robô | Fenêtre du terminal`
- **CLICKFIX PRETEXT** *(+40pts)*: ClickFix pretext with execution instructions: missing font
  > `missing font | Para provar que não é um robô`
  - *Suspicious keywords matched (2):*

    - `Win+X`
- **CLIPBOARD SOURCE** *(+25pts)*: 1 clipboard write API calls in page source

- **DEVICE CODE PHISH** *(+50pts)*: Device code phishing: device code phishing, DocuSign, non-official domain
  > `device code phishing | DocuSign | non-official domain`
- **FAKE ERROR PAGE** *(+30pts)*: 2 fake error/crash page signals
  > `Windows Defender alert | BSOD`
- **FAKE OS UI** *(+10pts)*: Fake system UI: 1 fake dialog/UI keyword(s)
  > `1 fake dialog/UI keyword(s)`
- **FILEFIX** *(+38pts)*: FileFix: paste into Explorer address bar
  > `File Explorer address bar`
